creativeBrief: Based on this music direction: '{{PROMPT}}', write a vivid 2-3 sentence creative brief for a SYNTHESIZER track. Focus ONLY on synth elements: basslines, pads, leads, arpeggios, chord stabs, drones, textures. Describe synthesis techniques (analog warmth, FM brightness, wavetable movement), filter sweeps, envelope shapes, and harmonic content. DO NOT mention drums, beats, hi-hats, kicks, percussion, or rhythm section - this is a synth-only instrument. Be evocative about timbres, textures, and emotional qualities. Reply with ONLY the brief text, no quotes or labels.

genreAugments.synthwave: SYNTHWAVE STYLE (80-120 BPM): Use arpeggiated patterns on Track 3 with sawtooth, high delay. Fat bass on Track 0 with square wave, low filterCutoff (~800Hz). Lush pads on Track 2 with triangle/sine, long attack (0.5s+), heavy reverb (0.6+). Lead melodies on Track 1 with sawtooth, medium-high notes. Classic 80s sound: detune for thickness, reverb for space.
genreAugments.ambient: AMBIENT STYLE (60-90 BPM or slower): Focus on texture over rhythm. Track 2 for evolving pads: sine/triangle, very long attack (2-4s), sustain 1.0, long release (2-4s), heavy reverb (0.7+). Track 0 for deep drones: low notes, very long durations (8-16 steps). Sparse melody on Track 1 if any. Filter cutoff low (~500-1500Hz) for warmth. Avoid busy patterns.
genreAugments.techno: TECHNO STYLE (125-140 BPM): Hypnotic, repetitive patterns. Track 0 bass: square wave, punchy short notes (duration 1-2), low filterCutoff (~400-800Hz). Track 1 for stabs: sawtooth, short attack, mid-range notes. Track 3 for hi-hat-like arpeggios: high notes, duration 1, triangle wave. Minimal melodies. Use filter automation mentally - vary cutoff values. Dark and driving.
genreAugments.house: HOUSE STYLE (118-128 BPM): Groovy and warm. Track 0 bass: sawtooth, medium-low notes, duration 2-4, slight detune. Track 1 for chord stabs: mid-range notes, short duration (1-2). Track 2 for warm pads: sine, sustain high. Track 3 for funky arpeggios. Keep it groovy - off-beat patterns work well. Reverb for space but keep it tight.
genreAugments.trance: TRANCE STYLE (136-145 BPM): Euphoric and driving. Track 3 for signature arpeggios: sawtooth, duration 1, mid-high notes, moderate delay. Track 0 bass: punchy, duration 2. Track 1 for supersaw-style leads: sawtooth with heavy detune (50-100), mid-high notes. Track 2 for emotional pads: long attack, high reverb. Build energy through the pattern.
genreAugments.chillwave: CHILLWAVE STYLE (80-110 BPM): Hazy and nostalgic. All tracks: lower filterCutoff (~1000-3000Hz) for warmth. Track 2 pads: triangle/sine, long attack, heavy reverb (0.6+). Track 1 melodies: simple, dreamy, mid-range. Track 0 bass: soft, sine wave, subtle. Add saturationDrive (30-50) for tape warmth. Relaxed, sun-drenched vibes.
genreAugments.darksynth: DARKSYNTH STYLE (100-140 BPM): Aggressive and cinematic. Track 0 bass: heavy, sawtooth/square, low filterCutoff, saturationDrive 60+. Track 1 leads: harsh sawtooth, some detune. Track 2 for dark pads: minor feel, long sustain. Track 3 for aggressive arpeggios. Use saturation for grit. Lower notes for menace. Build tension.
genreAugments.vaporwave: VAPORWAVE STYLE (60-100 BPM, often slow): Surreal and nostalgic. Heavy reverb on everything (0.7+). Track 2 for lush pads: long durations, sine/triangle. Track 1 for simple melodies: mid-range, sparse. Track 0 bass: subtle, soft. Think slowed-down muzak. Lower filterCutoff for muffled, lo-fi feel. Dreamy and detached.
genreAugments.experimental: IDM STYLE (variable tempo): Complex and experimental. Irregular rhythmic patterns across all tracks. Unexpected note placements. Track 3 for glitchy arpeggios: varying durations. Track 1 for abstract melodies: unusual intervals. Mix waveforms freely. Experiment with extreme parameter values. Sound design focus over traditional structure.
genreAugments.cinematic: CINEMATIC STYLE (variable tempo): Epic and emotional. Track 2 for sweeping pads: very long attack (1-3s), full sustain, high reverb (0.7+), wide range of notes. Track 0 for deep bass swells: long durations. Track 1 for melodic themes: expressive, varying durations. Track 3 for textural arpeggios. Build drama through dynamics. Think film score.

improve:
Analyze this synth track state and suggest ONE specific improvement as a short prompt (4-8 words). Focus on SYNTH elements only: basslines, pads, leads, arpeggios, chord stabs. Consider: missing synth layers (needs bass? add pads? lead melody?), timbral polish (add reverb? filter sweep? more detune?), arrangement (needs breakdown? build tension?). DO NOT suggest drums, beats, or percussion. STATE: {{STATE}}
Reply with ONLY the improvement prompt, no quotes or explanation.

thumbnail.basePrompt: Create striking album artwork for an electronic synth track
thumbnail.template: Create striking album artwork. {{GENRE_ARTWORK}}. The art must capture the energy and aesthetic of the music. ABSOLUTELY NO TEXT, LETTERS, WORDS, OR NUMBERS. Pure visual art only. Style: {{STYLE}}
styleHints: Retro synthwave aesthetic with neon grid landscapes and sunset gradients
Dark cyberpunk cityscape with rain and holographic billboards
Abstract geometric shapes with glowing neon outlines
Futuristic space scene with nebulae and starfields
Glitchy digital art with scan lines and chromatic aberration
Minimalist design with bold typography and stark contrast
Psychedelic vaporwave with marble statues and palm trees
Industrial tech aesthetic with circuit boards and wires
Ethereal dreamscape with floating geometric crystals
Neon-lit Japanese street scene with kanji signs
Abstract sound wave visualization with particle effects
Retro computer terminal aesthetic with green phosphor glow
Cosmic horror atmosphere with impossible geometry
Bioluminescent organic patterns and flowing forms
